indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: High ceiling
indicators.rationale: The high ceiling allows for better natural light and ventilation.

indicators.name: Windows
indicators.rationale: The windows allow for natural light and views, which can enhance focus and mood.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work due to its large open area, high ceiling, and natural light from the windows.
